title: Production Readiness Finding
description: Schema for a single finding emitted by any skill in the Nordic AI production-readiness library. See docs/CONVENTIONS.md for semantic rules.

id.description: Unique identifier. Prefix matches the emitting skill (see CONVENTIONS.md §4).

category.description: Skill-specific category. Each skill defines its own enum in its SKILL.md.

title.description: Short imperative phrase describing the finding.

description.description: What the gap is, why it matters, realistic exploitation / failure / enforcement scenario.

evidence.description: Code snippets, config, tool output, or GitNexus query results supporting the finding.

plan_mode.description: Concrete steps to fix, described (no edits made).

edit_mode.description: Diff, patch, or command sequence applicable in edit mode.

references.description: OWASP ASVS sections, CWE IDs, regulation articles, RFCs, vendor docs.

blocker_at_tier.description: Scope tiers at which this finding blocks launch. Empty array = advisory at all tiers.

related_findings.description: IDs of related findings from other skills — used by the orchestrator for cross-skill dedup.

framework.description: Regulatory framework (compliance-check only). E.g. GDPR, NIS2, EU_AI_ACT, PCI_DSS, HIPAA.

article.description: Specific article / section / requirement (compliance-check only). E.g. 'Art. 17', '§164.312(a)', 'Req. 3.4'.

expected_impact.description: Quantitative or qualitative expected impact of remediation (scalability-review only).

wcag_success_criterion.description: WCAG 2.x success criterion identifier (accessibility-audit only). E.g. '1.4.3'.
